title: Device Home Screen - Custom Quick Settings
scenario: Device Home Screen does not display any Quick Settings when all options are deselected under Device Settings > Quick Settings Selection while toggle remains ON
steps: Open Poly Studio Mobile app → Home screen
Tap on a connected device to open Device Settings
Navigate to Device Settings → Quick Settings Selection
Select 1 quick setting option (e.g., ANC, Transparency Mode, or Equalizer)
Return to Home screen and observe the quick settings row
Go back to Device Settings → Quick Settings Selection and select 2 more options (total of 3)
Return to Home screen and observe the quick settings row
Go back to Device Settings → Quick Settings Selection and deselect all options while keeping the Quick Settings toggle ON
Return to Home screen and observe the quick settings row
expected: When 1-3 quick settings are selected, those options appear as quick settings tiles on the Device Home Screen. When all options are deselected (but toggle remains ON), no quick settings tiles are displayed on the Home screen.
